sections.title: Agent Knowledge Maintenance
sections.description: This file defines the schema and maintenance policy for the compiled knowledge layer under `.agents/`.

sections.title: Agent knowledge starter kit merge
sections.description: Adopt the Agent-Knowledge-Starter-Kit layout by merging its scaffold into the existing .agents tree instead of replacing F-flat-minor-specific guidance.

sections.title: Decisions index
sections.description: One file per durable architectural or policy decision. New entries: follow [Entry shape](../MAINTENANCE.md#entry-shape) in `MAINTENANCE.md`, then add a row below.

sections.title: TypeScript runtime stdlib root discovery
sections.description: Node, Bun, and Deno should discover the built-in stdlib root by searching upward for ff/lib from stable anchors so compiled executables and varied CWDs work.

sections.title: Knowledge Index
sections.description: - `AGENTS.md`: repo-wide operational guidance and navigation. - `.agents/AGENTS.md`: concise knowledge-layer purpose and maintenance rules. - `.agents/docs/MAINTENANCE.md`: schema and policy for maintaining `.agents/` (durable entry contracts, logging, lint hygiene).

sections.title: Knowledge Maintenance Log
sections.description: Outcome: updated Files: `.agents/docs/troubleshooting/git-restore-agents-role-files.md`; `.agents/docs/troubleshooting/index.md` (via docs-compile); `.agents/skills/docs-search/docs-search-index.json` Accepted: durable troubleshooting entry for losing uncommitted `.agents/agents/` edits after `git checkout` restore; session bundle marked distilled Rejected: optional knowledge-lint helper script (stay one-off until maintainer asks); duplicate bullets in `MAINTENANCE.md` when troubleshooting entry

sections.title: Precision-Helper `atan` Refactor
sections.description: Refactor ff/lib/math/atan.ffp away from its current ad hoc scale-driven public API and toward the library’s newer precision-helper pattern. This change introduces public iatan, natan, and qatan, keeps an internal sca led helper for pi.ffp, retains atan-inv as a helper alias, an...

sections.title: Standardize `ff-run` CLI Across Deno, Node, and Bun
sections.description: Standardize the three ff-run entrypoints so Deno, Node, and Bun expose t he same CLI contract and observable behavior. Use the current Deno imple mentation as the canonical reference, while preserving only unavoidable runtime-specific differences and updating the runtime READMEs...

sections.title: Add `cons` parity to Racket
sections.description: Implement the cons system primitive in the Racket runtime so it matches the existing TypeScript behavior and can run ff/lib/seq/*.ffp programs t hat depend on cons.

sections.title: Archive index
sections.description: Retired maintainer plans (terminal `status` values per [write-plan CONTRACT](../../skills/write-plan/CONTRACT.md)). Active plans: [../index.md](../index.md).

sections.title: Standard Library Cleanup
sections.description: Address redundancy, dead code, private re-implementations, and naming in consistencies found in ff/lib during a full library audit. All changes a re non-breaking except for the tail! rename, which has one external call site in ff/euler/euler3.ffp that must be updated in the same...

sections.title: Precision-Driven `nexp` Without Fixed `e`
sections.description: Replace the current nexp implementation in ff/lib/math/exp.ffp with a pr ecision-driven algorithm that computes floor(10^n * e^x) directly from a n integer-only exponential series. The new design removes the fixed __ex p__e precision ceiling and makes correctness depend on the ca...

sections.title: Node Chomp Build, Test, and Benchmark Support
sections.description: Add first-class chomp support for the existing Node implementation so th e repo can run build, test, and bench workflows for Node in the same sty le as other runtimes. This plan intentionally scopes Node support to the current ff-run source runner and does not expand Node's CLI ...

sections.title: `nsqrt` and `isqrt` follow-up plan
sections.description: Current integer square root behavior lives in [ff/lib/math/sqrt.ffp](ff/ lib/math/sqrt.ffp), where [isqrt](ff/lib/math/sqrt.ffp:52) uses the recu rsive digit-by-digit helper [__sqrt__next](ff/lib/math/sqrt.ffp:40). Old er alternatives [isqrt_newton](ff/lib/math/sqrt.ffp:16) and [...

sections.title: Add Public `maybe_prime?` and Accelerate Prime Helpers
sections.description: Add a public Miller–Rabin-based maybe_prime? to ff/lib/math/primes.ffp, and use it internally to speed up prime? and next-prime without changing their exact result contracts. Outcome: implemented in ff/lib/math/prime s.ffp and covered by the updated primes test file. The shared...

sections.title: Depth-Aware TAP Indentation for Assertion and Plan Words
sections.description: Implement depth-derived indentation inside OK, PLAN, #SKIP, and #TODO in ff/lib/tap.ffp, and remove the @OK, @PLAN, @#SKIP, and @#TODO variants. Limit this change to assertion/plan emission only; do not change TEST y et because its call-site stack shape is not depth-stable whil...

sections.title: Improve trace output for humans and LLM agents
sections.description: Redesign tracing output to provide a concise default human-readable form at and an optional machine-readable JSONL mode for LLM/agent tooling. Ke ep backwards compatibility via opt-in flags and preserve existing tracin g semantics.

sections.title: Add a UTC epoch-to-string utility to F♭m
sections.description: Add a small utility that converts a Unix timestamp in seconds into a UTC ISO-8601 string, for example 1712088000 -> 2024-04-02T12:00:00Z, by spl itting calendar arithmetic from output formatting.

sections.title: Web Playground Async Runner and Worker Cancellation
sections.description: Prevent browser freezes from non-halting programs by adding cooperative async execution in the shared engine, then moving playground execution t o a Web Worker with explicit cancellation and hard-stop termination.

sections.title: Atan Core Readability Refactor
sections.description: Improve readability and safety of ff/lib/math/atan-core.ffp and ff/lib/m ath/atan.ffp by eliminating .unsafe usage, improving helper naming, and adding per-line stack-effect annotations.

sections.title: F-flat-minor Codetta
sections.description: Codetta is now a shipped mode inside the existing web playground, not a separate app. It presents a curated set of Coda Etudes backed directly b y files in ff/codetta, lets players load the current best solution, run edits in the browser, inspect output and compiled bytecode, a...

sections.title: Directory Loading for `.import`
sections.description: Directory index resolution when `.import` names a folder; implemented alongside `fbm-preprocessor-import-path-overhaul.md` in the shared import resolver.

sections.title: Align Division Semantics Across Runtimes
sections.description: Make all maintained F♭m runtimes implement the same negative-integer sem antics for / and %. The canonical rule is truncate-toward-zero division with the matching remainder: q = trunc(a / b), r = a - b*q. This is an e xplicit project decision, not just a temporary reading of cur...

sections.title: FBM Preprocessor Import Path Overhaul
sections.description: Implemented a two-tier import resolver for the FBM preprocessor: explici t file-relative imports keep current behavior, while angle-bracket impor ts resolve through a configurable standard-library search path. The ship ped shared resolver also includes same-name directory-index r...

sections.title: Fbm Website Migration Plan
sections.description: ## Goal Document the current state of the Fbm website migration, capture what has already landed, and keep the remaining work focused on future embeddable playground and REPL web components. ## Implementation Status - **Stage 1 — `lit-html`...

sections.title: `ff/lib` TAP test coverage checklist
sections.description: Track **public** words in [ff/lib/](../ff/lib/) (excluding _ / __ prefix es) that **do not appear as literal tokens** in any [ff/lib/**/__tests__ /](../ff/lib/) source (.ffp / .ff). Checking off items means a test file names the word in executable code (not only in comments).

sections.title: F♭m String Design: `cons` and `concat`
sections.description: ## Overview Double-quoted strings (e.g. `"hello"`) are compiler sugar fo r a **quote that pushes character codes**. They are first-class values — a single pointer on the stack, like any other quote. ``` "hi" ≡ [ 'h' ' i' ] ≡ [ 104 105 ] ``` T...

sections.title: F♭m Arbitrary Precision Math Library
sections.description: The complete math library rests on: 1. **Two series loop words** — exp-p arts (Shape 1) and atanh-parts/atan-parts (Shape 2, sign flag distinguis hes them) 2. **Two layers** — internal -parts words return p q; user-fac ing words apply p/q*S once at the boundary 3. **Single precis...

sections.title: Go Preprocessor Macro Parity Plan
sections.description: ## Overview This plan documents the comparison between the TypeScript an d Go preprocessor implementations, identifies missing macro-related func tionality in the Go implementation, and provides a step-by-step remediat ion plan. ## Files Analy...

sections.title: Hybrid ERS Implementation Plan
sections.description: Below is a concrete implementation plan for a **hybrid ERS system**: a s mall static tool handles the deterministic expand/reduce/resynthesize st eps, while the skill remains responsible for ambiguous choices, reportin g, and higher-level revi...

sections.title: Plans index
sections.description: One file per maintainer initiative or roadmap. New entries: follow the plan contract in [write-plan CONTRACT](../skills/write-plan/CONTRACT.md), then add a row below. Retired plans: [archive/](archive/index.md).

sections.title: F♭m Language Server (VSCode Extension)
sections.description: Build a future typescript/language-server/ package on top of the already -landed shared typescript/compile-service/ foundation, then optionally m igrate the existing vscode-f-flat-minor/ extension from direct VS Code p roviders and commands to an LSP client for .ff and .ffp files.

sections.title: Source-Driven Reference Manual for F♭m
sections.description: Add a maintainable F♭m reference manual that defines a documentation mod el, prototypes extraction with cdoc, combines generated and hand-written documentation, and integrates into the web project as a new section.

sections.title: Static Code Analysis for f-flat-minor
sections.description: Static code analysis has partially landed via the TypeScript compile-ser vice pipeline, where an IR-based analyzer uses pointer metadata to detec t invalid calls such as 10 eval. The remaining work is to integrate equi valent analysis into the compiler-level typescript/core flow ...

sections.title: More efficient F-flat-minor trace output
sections.description: Reduce the size, parse cost, and memory pressure of recorded VM traces ( today: verbose JSONL on stderr) while keeping a clear path for tools, th e VS Code trace viewer, and optional human/LLM-friendly output.

sections.title: TypeScript Debug Traceability (Compile + Runtime)
sections.description: Add source-level debugging metadata to the TypeScript implementations so compile-time diagnostics and runtime faults can be traced back to sourc e file and line/column, without changing emitted .ffb bytecode payloads.

sections.title: Expand TypeScript Optimizer Peephole Rules
sections.description: Document a practical shortlist of additional peephole optimizations for [typescript/core/src/optimizer.ts](typescript/core/src/optimizer.ts), pr ioritizing rules that are semantics-preserving, cheap to match, and cons istent with the current IR rule style.

sections.title: VSCode ERS Definition Commands
sections.description: Add three VSCode commands — Expand Current Definition, Collapse Current Definition, and Audit Current Definition — that operate on the definitio n under the cursor by delegating analysis and rewrites to the ERS toolch ain rather than requiring a full language server.

sections.title: VSCode Full DAP Debugger for F-flat-minor
sections.description: Build a real VS Code debugger for the TypeScript F-flat-minor runtime us ing the Debug Adapter Protocol, after the trace-viewer prototype has val idated the core UX and runtime metadata needs.

sections.title: VSCode Time-Travel Debugger for F-flat-minor
sections.description: Superseded by two narrower plans: vscode-trace-viewer.md for the fast tr ace-viewer prototype and vscode-full-dap-debugger.md for the later full VS Code debugger / DAP work.

sections.title: VSCode Trace Viewer for F-flat-minor
sections.description: Build a VS Code trace viewer for the TypeScript F-flat-minor runtime tha t runs existing .ff / .ffp programs, captures a recorded execution trace , and lets the user move forward and backward through the trace while vi ewing IR, stack state, and queue state.

sections.title: Editor Word Inspector Panel
sections.description: Add a word definition inspector panel to the Playground and Tutorial cod e editors, similar to the existing REPL inspector. Phase A enables inspe ction after program execution. Phase B adds live compile-on-change for i mmediate definition updates without execution.

sections.title: Web Playground Optimize Timing Diagnosis
sections.description: Add targeted diagnostics for the web playground so the repo can determin e whether optimized runs are being timed incorrectly in the browser or w hether optimized IR is genuinely slower for some workloads such as ff/eu ler/euler7.ffp.

sections.title: Compiled Bun stdlib imports
sections.description: Prelude import failures from Bun-built binaries when stdlib roots include /ff/lib; points to resolver and workaround steps.

sections.title: Git restore drops uncommitted edits under `.agents/`
sections.description: Running git checkout or git restore from HEAD on paths under `.agents/` replaces working-tree files and discards uncommitted markdown edits done earlier in the session.

sections.title: Troubleshooting index
sections.description: One file per recurring issue pattern. New entries: follow [Entry shape](../MAINTENANCE.md#entry-shape) in `MAINTENANCE.md`, then add a row below.

sections.title: Repo tool resolution
sections.description: Wrong or missing repo-managed tools (chomp, deno, node, bun, npm, go); prefer mise exec and correct working directories.

sections.title: Playbooks
sections.description: Use this directory for durable, multi-step procedures that agents may need to follow repeatedly.

sections.title: Running code playbook
sections.description: Use this playbook when you need to choose a runtime and execute F-flat-minor source.

sections.title: Test and dev workflows playbook
sections.description: Use this playbook for common repo execution workflows after code changes.

sections.title: Agent Knowledge Layer
sections.description: Consult the root `AGENTS.md` first for repo-wide operational guidance. This file describes the compiled knowledge layer under `.agents/`.
